haikus.haiku:
Creamy bliss inside,
Flaky layers dance in light,
Chocolate dreams delight.
Happy #NationalChocolateEclairDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden rings of joy,
Crispy whispers greet the bite,
Dipping sauce delights.
Happy #NationalOnionRingDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright stars twinkle on,
Warm cake glows with candles' light,
Laughter fills the night.
#HappyBirthdayOctaviaButler from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunshine warmly glows,
Melodies dance in the air,
Laughter fills the room.
#HappyBirthdayKrisKristofferson from @ClamBakeSanta

Warm sun on my face,
Gentle waves kiss sandy shores,
Together we shine.
Happy #WelcomeToCancerSeason from @ClamBakeSanta
